checks.message: Every supported claim references declared evidence inputs.
Supported claims and explicit non-claims arrays are present and non-empty.
Supported claims and explicit non-claims are disjoint by normalized statement.
Supported claims and unresolved unknowns are disjoint by normalized statement.
All declared handoff roles are within the allowed downstream-role enum.
All collected IDs match the v0.1 ID pattern.
Record parsed as a top-level JSON object.
All local placement-profile references resolve within the record.
Explicit non-claims and unresolved unknowns are disjoint by normalized statement.
All required top-level fields are present.
No restricted authority leakage detected in claim-bearing fields.
Role classification values are within the allowed v0.1 enum.
All collected placement-profile IDs are unique.
No active unresolved unknowns declare indeterminate status.
Verification state is declared using an allowed v0.1 value.

non_claims: Does not validate semantic truth of claims.
Does not verify external artifact existence.
Does not perform cross-record graph validation.
